name: West Valley City job, talked to adjuster already, messed up?

mainEntity.name: West Valley City job, talked to adjuster already, messed up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Not ruined—lawyer counters statements w/ evidence.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly minimized claim; still file and get lawyer to fix.** Statements can hurt but not fatal.[6] Key factors: Don't sign releases; supplement with records. Attorney negotiates better. Act now.
